entries.english: The strongest source trail supports a cautious estimate of possible civilian deaths in the final phase of the war, up to `40,000`. That is not an exact count, not a Mullivaikkal-only count, and not permission to erase Tamil civilian suffering.

entries.french_draft: L'ensemble de sources le plus solide étaye une estimation prudente du nombre possible de décès civils durant la phase finale de la guerre, allant jusqu'à `40,000`. Il ne s'agit ni d'un décompte exact, ni d'un décompte limité à Mullivaikkal, ni d'une autorisation d'effacer les souffrances des civils tamouls.

entries.english: In context, the trapped civilian population in the final-phase Vanni war zone was overwhelmingly Tamil. That fact must be named. But the death-toll sentence still needs limits: source wording, geography, category, cause, perpetrator attribution, and legal intent are separate questions.

entries.french_draft: Dans ce contexte, la population civile prise au piège dans la zone de guerre du Vanni, durant la phase finale du conflit, était très majoritairement tamoule. Ce fait doit être énoncé. Toutefois, l’énoncé du bilan des morts nécessite des précisions : la formulation des sources, la géographie, la catégorie, la cause, l’attribution de la responsabilité et l’intention juridique constituent autant de questions distinctes.

entries.english: Mullivaikkal should not be reduced to a number. It is a place of grief for Tamil families and a symbol of the final phase of Sri Lanka's war, when civilians trapped in the Vanni suffered catastrophic harm, overwhelmingly among Tamil communities. No correction of a public claim should be used to erase that suffering.
entries.sinhala_current: මුල්ලිවෛක්කාල් ගණනකට පමණක් අඩු කරන්න බැහැ. එය දමිළ පවුල්වල ශෝකය බැඳුණු තැනක්; වන්නියේ සිරවුණු සිවිල් වැසියන්, බහුතරයක් දමිළ ප්‍රජාවන්, විශාල හානියකට මුහුණ දුන් ශ්‍රී ලංකා යුද්ධයේ අවසන් අදියරේ සංකේතයක්. Public claim එකක් නිවැරදි කරන එක, ඒ දුක්විඳීම මකා දාන්න භාවිතා කරන්න බැහැ.
entries.french_draft: Mullivaikkal ne doit pas être réduit à un chiffre. C’est un lieu de deuil pour les familles tamoules et un symbole de la phase finale de la guerre au Sri Lanka, durant laquelle des civils pris au piège dans le Vanni ont subi des souffrances effroyables, touchant majoritairement les communautés tamoules. Aucune rectification d’une déclaration publique ne saurait servir à effacer cette souffrance.
entries.review_note: Preserve key SEO/source/legal abbreviations where they aid comprehension.

entries.english: The problem this dossier examines is not whether grief is real. It is how public claims harden when numbers move through memory, translation, legal language, Wikipedia, NGO summaries, political recognition, state rebuttals, and social media.
entries.sinhala_current: මෙම dossier එක පරීක්ෂා කරන්නේ ශෝකය ඇත්තද නැද්ද කියන ප්‍රශ්නය නෙවෙයි. ගණන් මතකය, පරිවර්තනය, නීති භාෂාව, Wikipedia, NGO සාරාංශ, දේශපාලන පිළිගැනීම්, රාජ්‍ය ප්‍රතිචාර සහ social media හරහා යන විට public claims harden වෙන්නේ කොහොමද කියන එකයි.
entries.french_draft: La question que ce dossier examine n’est pas de savoir si le deuil est réel. Il s’agit de comprendre comment les revendications publiques se figent à mesure que les chiffres traversent la mémoire, la traduction, le langage juridique, Wikipédia, les synthèses d’ONG, la reconnaissance politique, les réfutations étatiques et les réseaux sociaux.
entries.review_note: Preserve key SEO/source/legal abbreviations where they aid comprehension.

entries.english: This article tests claim transfer: what number is being used, what geography it refers to, whether it means killed, missing, unaccounted for, disappeared, or legally adjudicated, and whether the source actually says what the public slogan says.
entries.sinhala_current: මෙම ලිපිය claim transfer එක පරීක්ෂා කරයි: භාවිතා කරන ගණන මොකක්ද, එය යොමු කරන්නේ කුමන භූගෝලයටද, එයින් කියවෙන්නේ මියගිය, අතුරුදහන්, ගණන් නොවූ, බලහත්කාරයෙන් අතුරුදහන් වූ, නැත්නම් නීතියෙන් තීන්දු කළ කාණ්ඩයක්ද, සහ source එක public slogan එක කියන දේ ඇත්තටම කියනවාද කියන එක.
entries.french_draft: Cet article examine le transfert d'affirmations : quel chiffre est utilisé, à quelle zone géographique il renvoie, s'il désigne des personnes tuées, portées disparues, dont le sort est inconnu, victimes de disparitions forcées ou dont le décès a été légalement établi, et si la source dit réellement ce qu'affirme le slogan public.

entries.english: The SEO war matters because most people do not meet the original source first. They meet a search result, an infobox, a memorial page, a political recognition statement, a reposted explainer, a social post, or a state rebuttal.
entries.sinhala_current: SEO සටන වැදගත් වන්නේ බොහෝ දෙනා මුල් source එක මුලින්ම නොදකින නිසා. ඔවුන් මුලින්ම දකින්නේ search result එකක්, infobox එකක්, memorial page එකක්, දේශපාලන පිළිගැනීමේ ප්‍රකාශයක්, නැවත පළ කළ explainer එකක්, social post එකක් හෝ රාජ්‍ය ප්‍රතිචාරයක්.
entries.french_draft: La bataille du référencement (SEO) est cruciale car, pour la plupart des gens, la source originale n'est pas le premier point de contact. Ils tombent d'abord sur un résultat de recherche, un encadré d'information, une page commémorative, une déclaration de reconnaissance politique, une vidéo explicative repartagée, une publication sur les réseaux sociaux ou une réfutation officielle.
entries.review_note: Preserve key SEO/source/legal abbreviations where they aid comprehension.

entries.english: Search systems reward simple, repeatable phrases. They do not automatically preserve source categories. In that environment, a cautious final-phase estimate can become a place-specific slogan, and a place-specific slogan can become a public-memory fact.
entries.sinhala_current: Search systems සරලව නැවත නැවත කියවිය හැකි වාක්‍ය ඉහළට ගෙන එනවා. ඒවා source categories ස්වයංක්‍රීයව ආරක්ෂා කරන්නේ නැහැ. එවැනි පරිසරයක, ප්‍රවේශම් සහිත final-phase estimate එකක් place-specific slogan එකක් වෙන්න පුළුවන්; place-specific slogan එකක් public-memory fact එකක් වෙන්නත් පුළුවන්.
entries.french_draft: Les systèmes de recherche privilégient les expressions simples et répétables. Ils ne préservent pas systématiquement les catégories d'origine. Dans ce contexte, une estimation prudente établie en phase finale peut se transformer en un slogan propre à un lieu, et ce slogan peut devenir un fait ancré dans la mémoire collective.
entries.review_note: Preserve key SEO/source/legal abbreviations where they aid comprehension.

entries.english: Some of the most powerful public pages do not invent claims from nothing. They compress source routes.
entries.sinhala_current: බලවත් public pages කිහිපයක් claims හිස් තැනින් හදන්නේ නැහැ. ඒවා මූලාශ්‍ර මාර්ග කෙටි කර public wording එකක් බවට හරවනවා. මෙම dossier එක ඒ ක්‍රියාව “source routes compress” කියලා හඳුන්වනවා.
entries.french_draft: Certaines des pages publiques les plus puissantes n'inventent pas d'affirmations de toutes pièces. Elles condensent les chemins menant aux sources.
entries.review_note: Keep coined technical phrases clear; explain rather than over-transliterate.

entries.english: A UN-linked estimate can become an NGO summary. An NGO summary can become a Wikipedia citation. A Wikipedia sentence can become a mirror-page fact. A mirror-page fact can become an AI answer or a social caption. By the time an average reader sees the sentence, the careful source wording has disappeared and the repeated public wording feels like the archive itself.
entries.sinhala_current: UN-linked estimate එකක් NGO summary එකක් වෙන්න පුළුවන්. NGO summary එකක් Wikipedia citation එකක් වෙන්න පුළුවන්. Wikipedia sentence එකක් mirror-page fact එකක් වෙන්න පුළුවන්. Mirror-page fact එකක් AI answer එකක් හෝ social caption එකක් වෙන්න පුළුවන්. සාමාන්‍ය කියවන්නෙක් ඒ වාක්‍යය දකින වෙලාවට, ප්‍රවේශම් සහිත source wording එක අතුරුදහන් වෙලා, නැවත නැවත පෙනෙන public wording එක archive එකම වගේ දැනෙන්න පටන් ගන්නවා.
entries.french_draft: Une estimation liée à l’ONU peut devenir une synthèse d’ONG. Une synthèse d’ONG peut devenir une citation sur Wikipédia. Une phrase issue de Wikipédia peut devenir une information sur un site miroir. Cette information peut ensuite devenir une réponse générée par une IA ou une légende sur les réseaux sociaux. Lorsque le lecteur lambda découvre cette phrase, la formulation originale et rigoureuse de la source a disparu, et la version publique, maintes fois répétée, finit par être perçue comme l’archive elle-même.

entries.english: cautious upper estimate -> media/NGO simplification -> Wikipedia or mirror repetition -> memorial or political recognition language -> social post -> search-result common sense
entries.sinhala_current: ප්‍රවේශම් සහිත upper estimate -> media/NGO simplification -> Wikipedia හෝ mirror repetition -> memorial හෝ political recognition language -> social post -> search-result common sense
entries.french_draft: estimation haute prudente -> simplification par les médias ou les ONG -> répétition sur Wikipédia ou des sites miroirs -> langage de commémoration ou de reconnaissance politique -> publication sur les réseaux sociaux -> « bon sens » issu des résultats de recherche

entries.english: That does not prove a hidden command structure. It proves a propagation problem. Wikipedia pages, mirrors, NGO pages, legal briefs, political-recognition texts, and social posts can repeat each other. Repetition can look like independent proof even when the route is derivative.
entries.sinhala_current: ඒක සැඟවුණු command structure එකක් prove කරන්නේ නැහැ. ඒක propagation problem එකක් පෙන්වනවා. Wikipedia pages, mirrors, NGO pages, legal briefs, political-recognition texts, සහ social posts එකිනෙක නැවත නැවත කියන්න පුළුවන්. Route එක derivative වුණත්, repetition එක independent proof වගේ පේන්න පුළුවන්.
entries.french_draft: Cela ne prouve pas l'existence d'une structure de commandement occulte. Cela met en évidence un problème de propagation. Les pages Wikipédia, les sites miroirs, les pages d'ONG, les mémoires juridiques, les textes de reconnaissance politique et les publications sur les réseaux sociaux peuvent se répéter les uns les autres. Cette répétition peut donner l'apparence d'une preuve indépendante, alors même que l'information est dérivée d'une source unique.
entries.review_note: Preserve key SEO/source/legal abbreviations where they aid comprehension.

entries.english: Wikipedia is especially important because it can turn a contested narrative into the first reference layer for journalists, students, search snippets, AI summaries, and mirror sites. If a Wikipedia sentence relies on diaspora-authored, Tamil-advocacy, NGO, memorial, or political-recognition sources, that fact should be shown as source genealogy, not used as ethnic disqualification.
entries.sinhala_current: Wikipedia විශේෂයෙන් වැදගත්. ඒකට contested narrative එකක් journalists, students, search snippets, AI summaries, සහ mirror sites සඳහා පළමු reference layer එකක් බවට හරවන්න පුළුවන්. Wikipedia sentence එකක් diaspora-authored, Tamil-advocacy, NGO, memorial, හෝ political-recognition sources මත රඳා තිබේ නම්, ඒක “source genealogy” විදිහට පෙන්විය යුතුයි; ethnic disqualification එකක් විදිහට භාවිතා නොකළ යුතුයි.
entries.french_draft: Wikipédia revêt une importance particulière car le site peut transformer un récit contesté en une référence première pour les journalistes, les étudiants, les extraits de résultats de recherche, les résumés générés par l'IA et les sites miroirs. Si une phrase sur Wikipédia s'appuie sur des sources émanant de la diaspora, d'organisations de défense de la cause tamoule, d'ONG, de lieux de mémoire ou d'instances de reconnaissance politique, cet élément devrait être présenté comme une généalogie de la source, et non servir de motif de disqualification fondée sur l'appartenance ethnique.
entries.review_note: Preserve key SEO/source/legal abbreviations where they aid comprehension.

entries.english: This is why the dossier treats high-authority surfaces as evidence objects, not enemies. A page can be sincere, useful, and still unsafe for a precise claim. Amnesty 2024 can show location compression. OISL 2015 can support incident and accountability patterns without proving `40,000` as a death-count source. Guardian May 2009 reporting can provide contemporaneous witness/media context without becoming an audited total.
entries.sinhala_current: ඒ නිසා මෙම dossier එක high-authority surfaces සතුරන් ලෙස නොව evidence objects ලෙස සලකනවා. Page එකක් sincere සහ useful වෙන්න පුළුවන්; ඒත් precise claim එකකට unsafe වෙන්නත් පුළුවන්. Amnesty 2024 location compression පෙන්වන්න පුළුවන්. OISL 2015 incident සහ accountability patterns support කරන්න පුළුවන්, නමුත් `40,000` death-count source එකක් ලෙස ඔප්පු කරන්නේ නැහැ. Guardian May 2009 reporting එක contemporaneous witness/media context දෙන්න පුළුවන්, audited total එකක් නොවී.
entries.french_draft: C'est pourquoi le dossier traite les sources faisant autorité comme des éléments de preuve, et non comme des adversaires. Une page peut être sincère et utile, tout en étant peu fiable pour étayer une affirmation précise. Le rapport d'Amnesty de 2024 peut mettre en évidence une agrégation géographique des données. Le rapport de l'OISL de 2015 peut étayer des schémas relatifs aux incidents et aux responsabilités sans pour autant valider la source `40,000` comme référence pour le décompte des décès. Les articles du *Guardian* de mai 2009 peuvent fournir un contexte médiatique et des témoignages de l'époque, sans pour autant constituer un bilan chiffré audité.

entries.english: In this package, the SEO work already completed includes a reviewed top-100 seed capture, three live crawl evidence batches, and a consolidated inspected-URL register. That gives a testable route map for what has been seen, what is still blocked or weak-linked, and where category collapse is actually happening in public surfaces.
entries.sinhala_current: මෙම package එකේ දැනට අවසන් කර ඇති SEO work එකට reviewed top-100 seed capture එකක්, live crawl evidence batches තුනක්, සහ consolidated inspected-URL register එකක් ඇතුළත් වෙනවා. ඒකෙන් දැනට දැක ඇති දේ, තවම blocked හෝ weak-linked දේ, සහ public surfaces වල category collapse ඇත්තටම සිදුවෙන තැන් පරීක්ෂා කළ හැකි route map එකක් ලැබෙනවා.
entries.french_draft: Dans le cadre de cette prestation, le travail SEO déjà réalisé comprend une sélection validée des 100 premières URL sources, trois séries de données issues de crawls en conditions réelles ainsi qu'un registre consolidé des URL examinées. Ces éléments constituent une feuille de route exploitable pour identifier les pages détectées, celles qui restent bloquées ou présentent des liens fragiles, ainsi que les zones où s'opère concrètement un effondrement des catégories sur les interfaces publiques.
entries.review_note: Preserve key SEO/source/legal abbreviations where they aid comprehension.

entries.english: The same problem appears in political recognition. A parliamentary motion, mayoral proclamation, or prime-ministerial statement can give dignity to memory and political visibility to a community. But it is not a casualty method. It does not transform an estimate into a verified count, and it does not turn a recognition phrase into a court finding.
entries.sinhala_current: එම ප්‍රශ්නය political recognition වලත් පේනවා. Parliamentary motion එකක්, mayoral proclamation එකක්, හෝ prime-ministerial statement එකක් memory එකට ගෞරවයත් community එකකට political visibility එකත් දෙන්න පුළුවන්. නමුත් ඒක casualty method එකක් නෙවෙයි. Estimate එක verified count එකක් බවට හරවන්නේ නැහැ; recognition phrase එක court finding එකක් බවටත් හරවන්නේ නැහැ.
entries.french_draft: Le même problème se pose en matière de reconnaissance politique. Une motion parlementaire, une proclamation municipale ou une déclaration du Premier ministre peut conférer de la dignité à la mémoire et une visibilité politique à une communauté. Toutefois, il ne s’agit pas d’une méthode de dénombrement des victimes : cela ne transforme pas une estimation en un décompte vérifié, ni une formule de reconnaissance en une constatation judiciaire.
entries.review_note: Do not force a one-word Tamil/French equivalent if the legal lane needs explanation.

entries.english: So the SEO answer is not to shout louder. It is to build a better archive around the claim: original source pages, claim tables, Wikipedia citation audits, bilingual explainers, and correction pages that answer the phrase people actually search.
entries.sinhala_current: ඒ නිසා SEO answer එක තවත් හයියෙන් කෑගහන එක නෙවෙයි. Claim එක වටා හොඳ archive එකක් ගොඩනගන එකයි: original source pages, claim tables, Wikipedia citation audits, bilingual explainers, සහ මිනිසුන් ඇත්තටම search කරන වාක්‍යයට පිළිතුරු දෙන correction pages.
entries.french_draft: La réponse en matière de SEO ne consiste donc pas à crier plus fort. Il s'agit plutôt de constituer une meilleure base documentaire autour de l'affirmation : pages sources originales, tableaux récapitulatifs, audits des citations sur Wikipédia, contenus explicatifs bilingues et pages de rectification répondant aux termes réellement saisis par les internautes.

entries.english: The same sentence can carry three different meanings: memory meaning, legal meaning, and proof meaning. We must name that lane before asking the audience to accept the conclusion.
entries.sinhala_current: එකම වාක්‍යයට meanings තුනක් carry කරන්න පුළුවන්: memory meaning, legal meaning, සහ proof meaning. Audience එක conclusion එක පිළිගන්න කලින් ඒ lane එක නම් කළ යුතුයි.
entries.french_draft: Une même phrase peut revêtir trois significations différentes : une signification liée à la mémoire, une signification juridique et une signification probante. Il convient de désigner cette voie avant de demander à l'auditoire d'accepter la conclusion.

entries.english: Sinhala terms like `ජන සංහාරය`, `සංහාරය`, and related forms are often used as collective-memory language and as legal shorthand at different times. English advocacy and media language can turn a contested route into a fixed moral sentence. Sinhala political language can hear that same sentence as a direct accusation against an entire side before source context is shared.
entries.sinhala_current: `ජන සංහාරය`, `සංහාරය`, සහ ඒවාට සම්බන්ධ සිංහල terms විවිධ අවස්ථාවල collective-memory language ලෙසත් legal shorthand ලෙසත් භාවිතා වෙනවා. English advocacy සහ media language contested route එකක් fixed moral sentence එකක් බවට හරවන්න පුළුවන්. Source context එක share වීමට කලින්ම, සිංහල political language එක ඒම වාක්‍යය සම්පූර්ණ පැත්තකට එල්ල කළ චෝදනාවක් ලෙස අහන්න පුළුවන්.
entries.french_draft: Des termes cinghalais tels que `ජන සංහාරය`, `සංහාරය` et leurs variantes servent souvent, selon les circonstances, d'éléments de mémoire collective ou de raccourcis juridiques. Le langage utilisé par les militants et les médias anglophones peut transformer un itinéraire contesté en un verdict moral immuable. Dans le discours politique cinghalais, ce même verdict peut être perçu comme une accusation directe visant tout un camp, avant même que le contexte d'origine ne soit partagé.
entries.review_note: Keep coined technical phrases clear; explain rather than over-transliterate.

entries.english: There is a related Sinhala-language problem: `massacre`, `ethnic cleansing`, and `genocide` do not always arrive in public discussion as clearly separated ideas. Sinhala Wikipedia has a technical route for `Ethnic cleansing` as `වාර්ගික විශුද්ධිකරණය` / `ජනවාර්ගික පාරිශුද්ධකරණය`, but this dossier does not treat that as proof of settled everyday use. In ordinary political speech, many readers are more likely to hear the shorter and emotionally heavier `සංහාරය` family of words.
entries.sinhala_current: මෙයට සම්බන්ධ සිංහල-language ප්‍රශ්නයක් තියෙනවා: `massacre`, `ethnic cleansing`, සහ `genocide` public discussion එකට පැමිණෙන්නේ හැමවිටම පැහැදිලිව වෙන් කළ අදහස් ලෙස නෙවෙයි. සිංහල Wikipedia එක `Ethnic cleansing` සඳහා `වාර්ගික විශුද්ධිකරණය` / `ජනවාර්ගික පාරිශුද්ධකරණය` කියන technical route එකක් දක්වයි. නමුත් මෙම dossier එක ඒක settled everyday use එකක් බවට proof ලෙස නොගනී. සාමාන්‍ය political speech තුළ, කියවන්නන් බොහෝ දෙනාට කෙටි සහ හැඟීම් බර `සංහාරය` family එක වඩා ඉක්මනින් ඇසෙන්න ඉඩ ඇත.
entries.french_draft: Il existe un problème connexe en cingalais : `massacre`, `ethnic cleansing` et `genocide` n'apparaissent pas toujours dans le débat public comme des idées nettement distinctes. La Wikipédia en cingalais propose une approche technique pour `Ethnic cleansing` sous la forme `වාර්ගික විශුද්ධිකරණය` / `ජනවාර්ගික පාරිශුද්ධකරණය`, mais le présent dossier ne considère pas cela comme la preuve d'un usage courant bien établi. Dans le discours politique ordinaire, il est plus probable que de nombreux lecteurs entendent la famille de mots `සංහාරය`, plus courte et plus chargée émotionnellement.
entries.review_note: Do not force a one-word Tamil/French equivalent if the legal lane needs explanation.

entries.english: That matters because the allegation can land differently in the Sinhala/Sri Lankan south. A Tamil or diaspora speaker may intend a claim about state conduct, command responsibility, final-phase civilian harm, or legal recognition. A Sinhala reader may hear the same word as an accusation against the Sinhala people as a whole, or against the entire southern civic community. The translation gap can turn a specific accountability claim into a civilisational accusation before the evidence is even discussed.
entries.sinhala_current: ඒක වැදගත්. එම allegation එක සිංහල/Sri Lankan south තුළ වෙනස් විදිහට land වෙන්න පුළුවන්. Tamil හෝ diaspora speaker කෙනෙකු state conduct, command responsibility, final-phase civilian harm, හෝ legal recognition ගැන claim එකක් අදහස් කරමින් කතා කළ හැකියි. සිංහල reader කෙනෙකුට ඒම වචනය සිංහල ජනතාවම, නැත්නම් දකුණු civic community එකම, චෝදනා කරන වචනයක් වගේ ඇසෙන්න පුළුවන්. Evidence එක ගැන කතා කරන්නත් කලින්, translation gap එක specific accountability claim එකක් civilisational accusation එකක් බවට හරවන්න පුළුවන්.
entries.french_draft: Cela revêt une importance particulière car l’allégation peut être perçue différemment dans le sud cinghalais du Sri Lanka. Lorsqu’une personne tamoule ou issue de la diaspora s’exprime, elle peut viser la conduite de l’État, la responsabilité du commandement, les préjudices subis par les civils lors de la phase finale du conflit ou encore la reconnaissance juridique. À l’inverse, un lecteur cinghalais peut interpréter ces mêmes propos comme une accusation portée contre le peuple cinghalais dans son ensemble, ou contre la communauté civile du sud tout entière. Ce décalage d’interprétation risque de transformer une revendication précise en matière de responsabilité en une accusation de nature civilisationnelle, avant même que les preuves ne soient examinées.
entries.review_note: Preserve key SEO/source/legal abbreviations where they aid comprehension.

entries.english: The responsible public wording must therefore say what is being alleged: mass killing, forced removal, war crimes, crimes against humanity, genocide intent, state responsibility, command responsibility, or political recognition. `සංහාරය` alone cannot be asked to carry all of that.
entries.sinhala_current: ඒ නිසා responsible public wording එක allegation එක මොකක්ද කියලා පැහැදිලිව නම් කළ යුතුයි: mass killing ද, forced removal ද, war crimes ද, crimes against humanity ද, genocide intent ද, state responsibility ද, command responsibility ද, නැත්නම් political recognition ද. `සංහාරය` වචනය තනිවම මේ සියල්ල carry කරන්න බැහැ.
entries.french_draft: La formulation publique responsable doit donc énoncer ce qui est allégué : massacres, déplacements forcés, crimes de guerre, crimes contre l’humanité, intention génocidaire, responsabilité de l’État, responsabilité du commandement ou reconnaissance politique. On ne peut demander à `සංහාරය` de porter tout cela à lui seul.

entries.english: Historic reporting and truth degradation
entries.sinhala_current: Historic reporting සහ truth degradation
entries.french_draft: Le récit historique et l'érosion de la vérité
entries.review_note: Use plain online-reader Tamil/French, not academic prose.

entries.english: Guardian reporting from May 2009 is useful here because it shows what responsible contemporaneous reporting looked like under restricted access. The 11 May report carried doctor and UN-spokesperson routes, government denial, claims about shelling, and an explicit verification problem: independent journalists were not allowed into the fighting area. The 19 May report carried camp-interview routes, a reported `15,000` claim, allegations against both the Sri Lankan military and the LTTE, and the same basic limit: independent confirmation was not possible inside the closed battlefield.
entries.sinhala_current: May 2009 Guardian reporting මෙහි වැදගත් වන්නේ restricted access යටතේ responsible contemporaneous reporting එකක් කොහොමද තිබුණේ කියලා පෙන්වන නිසා. 11 May report එක doctor route, UN-spokesperson route, government denial, shelling claims, සහ explicit verification problem එකක් carry කළා: independent journalists fighting area එකට ඇතුළු වීමට අවසර නොතිබුණා. 19 May report එක camp-interview routes, reported `15,000` claim එකක්, Sri Lankan military සහ LTTE දෙපාර්ශ්වයටම එරෙහි allegations, සහ ඒම basic limit එක carry කළා: closed battlefield එක ඇතුළත independent confirmation කළ නොහැකි වුණා.
entries.french_draft: Les reportages du *Guardian* datant de mai 2009 sont ici utiles, car ils illustrent la manière dont une information responsable était traitée à l'époque malgré les restrictions d'accès. L'article du 11 mai relayait les propos de médecins et d'un porte-parole de l'ONU, les démentis du gouvernement, des informations faisant état de bombardements, ainsi qu'une difficulté de vérification manifeste : les journalistes indépendants n'étaient pas autorisés à pénétrer dans la zone des combats. L'article du 19 mai rapportait des témoignages recueillis dans des camps, une allégation spécifique, des accusations visant tant l'armée sri-lankaise que les Tigres tamouls (LTTE), tout en soulignant la même limite fondamentale : l'impossibilité d'obtenir une confirmation indépendante au sein de ce champ de bataille inaccessible.
entries.review_note: Keep coined technical phrases clear; explain rather than over-transliterate.

entries.english: That is how truth degrades online. A careful article may preserve uncertainty, competing claims, witness distance, and access limits. Later search surfaces may keep the number, the outrage, or the headline while losing the caveat. The result is not always invented from nothing. It is often a real report stripped of the conditions that made it responsible.
entries.sinhala_current: Truth onlineවල degrade වෙන්නේ එහෙමයි. ප්‍රවේශම් සහිත article එකක් uncertainty, competing claims, witness distance, සහ access limits රැක ගන්න පුළුවන්. පසුව search surfaces number එක, outrage එක, හෝ headline එක තබාගෙන caveat එක නැති කරගන්න පුළුවන්. ප්‍රතිඵලය හැමවිටම හිස් තැනින් හදාගත් කතාවක් නොවෙයි. බොහෝ විට එය responsible කළ conditions ඉවත් කර ඇති real report එකක්.
entries.french_draft: C’est ainsi que la vérité s’altère en ligne. Un article rigoureux peut préserver l’incertitude, les versions contradictoires, la distance des témoins et les limites d’accès. Par la suite, les résultats de recherche peuvent ne retenir que le chiffre, l’indignation ou le titre, tout en perdant les nuances nécessaires. Le résultat n’est pas toujours inventé de toutes pièces ; il s’agit souvent d’un rapport authentique, mais dépouillé des conditions qui en garantissaient la rigueur.

entries.french_draft: Qui décide de ce qui constitue un génocide ?

entries.english: For this topic, the authority ladder is: memory/advocacy authority, investigative authority, and legal authority. Communities, memorial language, recognitions, and civic pressure can use genocide language as memory or advocacy. Evidence-gathering bodies can identify serious allegations and patterns. A criminal court or legally final tribunal can make a judicial finding for specific facts under strict legal standards.
entries.sinhala_current: මෙම topic එකේ authority ladder එක මෙහෙමයි: memory/advocacy authority, investigative authority, සහ legal authority. Communities, memorial language, recognitions, සහ civic pressure genocide language එක memory හෝ advocacy ලෙස භාවිතා කරන්න පුළුවන්. Evidence-gathering bodies serious allegations සහ patterns හඳුනාගන්න පුළුවන්. නමුත් specific facts ගැන strict legal standards යටතේ judicial finding එකක් කිරීමට හැක්කේ criminal court එකකට හෝ legally final tribunal එකකටයි.
entries.french_draft: En la matière, la hiérarchie des autorités s'établit comme suit : autorité liée à la mémoire et au plaidoyer, autorité d'enquête et autorité juridique. Les communautés, le discours mémoriel, les actes de reconnaissance et la pression citoyenne peuvent recourir au terme de « génocide » dans une optique de mémoire ou de plaidoyer. Les instances chargées de recueillir des éléments de preuve peuvent identifier des allégations graves et des schémas récurrents. Une juridiction pénale ou un tribunal dont la décision a force de chose jugée peut établir juridiquement des faits précis, en se fondant sur des normes juridiques rigoureuses.
entries.review_note: Do not force a one-word Tamil/French equivalent if the legal lane needs explanation.

entries.english: OHCHR matters because it publishes and applies the UN human-rights/treaty framework, including the Genocide Convention text. But OHCHR is not the court that criminally convicts people of genocide. The legal decision lane belongs to competent courts: the ICC for individual criminal responsibility where Rome Statute jurisdiction exists, the ICJ for disputes between States under the Genocide Convention, and domestic/ad hoc courts where they have lawful jurisdiction.
entries.sinhala_current: OHCHR වැදගත් වන්නේ එය Genocide Convention text ඇතුළු UN human-rights/treaty framework එක publish කර apply කරන නිසා. නමුත් OHCHR කියන්නේ genocide ගැන criminal conviction කරන court එක නෙවෙයි. Legal decision lane එක අදාළ competent courts වෙත යයි: Rome Statute jurisdiction ඇති තැන individual criminal responsibility සඳහා ICC; Genocide Convention යටතේ States අතර disputes සඳහා ICJ; සහ lawful jurisdiction ඇති domestic/ad hoc courts.
entries.french_draft: Le HCDH joue un rôle essentiel car il publie et met en œuvre le cadre onusien relatif aux droits de l'homme et aux traités, y compris le texte de la Convention sur le génocide. Toutefois, le HCDH n'est pas l'instance judiciaire chargée de prononcer des condamnations pénales pour génocide. La compétence en matière de décisions judiciaires relève des tribunaux compétents : la CPI pour la responsabilité pénale individuelle lorsque la compétence prévue par le Statut de Rome est établie, la CIJ pour les différends entre États au titre de la Convention sur le génocide, ainsi que les tribunaux nationaux ou *ad hoc* lorsqu'ils disposent d'une compétence légale.

entries.english: A political recognition statement, memorial motion, or public ceremony may be meaningful. It is not the same as a criminal adjudication of genocide for a specific claim.

entries.english: Sri Lanka cannot defeat propaganda by denying suffering. It can only defeat propaganda by building a truth standard strong enough to withstand both overclaim and counter-overclaim.
entries.sinhala_current: දුක්විඳීම ප්‍රතික්ෂේප කිරීමෙන් Sri Lanka ට propaganda පරාජය කරන්න බැහැ. Propaganda පරාජය කළ හැක්කේ overclaim සහ counter-overclaim දෙකම withstand කළ හැකි truth standard එකක් ගොඩනැගීමෙන් පමණයි.
entries.french_draft: Le Sri Lanka ne peut vaincre la propagande en niant la souffrance. Il ne peut y parvenir qu'en établissant une norme de vérité suffisamment solide pour résister tant aux affirmations excessives qu'aux contre-affirmations tout aussi exagérées.
entries.review_note: Preserve key SEO/source/legal abbreviations where they aid comprehension.

entries.english: That means credible casualty accounting, archive preservation, witness protection, lawful record release, memorial freedom, category clarity, and correction without ethnic contempt.
entries.sinhala_current: ඒක කියන්නේ credible casualty accounting, archive preservation, witness protection, lawful record release, memorial freedom, category clarity, සහ ethnic contempt නැති correction.
entries.french_draft: Cela implique un décompte crédible des victimes, la préservation des archives, la protection des témoins, la divulgation légale des documents, la liberté de commémoration, la clarté des catégories et la rectification sans mépris ethnique.
entries.review_note: Use plain online-reader Tamil/French, not academic prose.

entries.english: The correct civic stance is neither repetition nor denial. It is truth discipline: audit the number, acknowledge suffering, expose power routes, and refuse both propaganda and counter-propaganda.
entries.sinhala_current: නිවැරදි civic stance එක repetition එකක්වත් denial එකක්වත් නෙවෙයි. ඒක truth discipline එකක්: number එක audit කරන්න, suffering acknowledge කරන්න, power routes expose කරන්න, propaganda සහ counter-propaganda දෙකම ප්‍රතික්ෂේප කරන්න.
entries.french_draft: La juste posture civique ne réside ni dans la répétition ni dans le déni. Elle relève d’une discipline de vérité : vérifier les chiffres, reconnaître la souffrance, mettre au jour les rouages du pouvoir et refuser aussi bien la propagande que la contre-propagande.
entries.review_note: Use plain online-reader Tamil/French, not academic prose.

entries.english: This also asks something of Sri Lankan voters and civic power. A country cannot outsource truth to hashtags, foreign parliaments, diaspora organizations, state press releases, or angry rebuttals. Citizens have to demand and elect leaders with enough honesty to handle the record: the dead, the missing, the unlawful conduct allegations, the LTTE's crimes, the state's failures, and the uncomfortable gaps in the archive.
entries.sinhala_current: මෙය Sri Lankan voters සහ civic power වෙතත් ඉල්ලීමක් කරනවා. රටකට සත්‍යය hashtags, foreign parliaments, diaspora organizations, state press releases, හෝ angry rebuttals වෙත outsource කරන්න බැහැ. පුරවැසියන් ඉල්ලා elect කළ යුත්තේ record එක handle කරන්න තරම් honest leaders: මියගිය අය, missing අය, unlawful conduct allegations, LTTE crimes, state failures, සහ archive එකේ uncomfortable gaps.
entries.french_draft: Cela exige également quelque chose des électeurs sri-lankais et de la société civile. Un pays ne peut pas déléguer la vérité aux hashtags, aux parlements étrangers, aux organisations de la diaspora, aux communiqués officiels ou aux réfutations colériques. Les citoyens doivent exiger et élire des dirigeants faisant preuve d'une honnêteté suffisante pour affronter les faits : les morts, les disparus, les allégations d'agissements illégaux, les crimes des Tigres tamouls (LTTE), les défaillances de l'État et les lacunes gênantes des archives.
entries.review_note: Preserve key SEO/source/legal abbreviations where they aid comprehension.

entries.english: Journalists have a parallel duty. The minimum standard is not moral performance; it is respect for data and truth. A journalist, commentator, or creator who repeats a high-voltage number without source, category, geography, and method is not helping reconciliation. They are helping the algorithm. That applies to pro-state denial, diaspora overclaim, NGO compression, social-media rage, and prestige-media shorthand.
entries.sinhala_current: මාධ්‍යවේදීන්ටත් parallel duty එකක් තියෙනවා. Minimum standard එක moral performance නෙවෙයි; data සහ සත්‍යයට ගෞරවයයි. Source, category, geography, සහ method නැතිව high-voltage number එකක් repeat කරන journalist, commentator, හෝ creator reconciliation එකට උදව් කරන්නේ නැහැ. ඔවුන් algorithm එකට උදව් කරනවා. ඒක pro-state denial, diaspora overclaim, NGO compression, social-media rage, සහ prestige-media shorthand සියල්ලටම අදාළයි.
entries.french_draft: Les journalistes ont un devoir analogue. L’exigence minimale n’est pas de faire preuve de vertu morale, mais de respecter les données et la vérité. Un journaliste, un commentateur ou un créateur de contenu qui relaie un chiffre choc sans en préciser la source, la catégorie, le contexte géographique ou la méthodologie ne favorise pas la réconciliation ; il sert l’algorithme. Cela vaut pour le déni pro-étatique, les chiffres gonflés par la diaspora, la minimisation des données par les ONG, la colère sur les réseaux sociaux et les raccourcis des médias établis.
entries.review_note: Preserve key SEO/source/legal abbreviations where they aid comprehension.

entries.english: Funding and alignment also need discipline. Politicians, journalists, NGOs, diaspora groups, state institutions, creators, and platforms all operate inside incentives: donors, votes, access, audience, identity, reputation, grants, diplomatic pressure, and social reach. Those incentives matter and should be mapped. But visible funding or political alignment is not proof of message causation unless the record shows a money-to-message route.
entries.sinhala_current: Funding සහ alignment ගැනත් discipline අවශ්‍යයි. Politicians, journalists, NGOs, diaspora groups, state institutions, creators, සහ platforms සියල්ල incentives තුළ operate කරනවා: donors, votes, access, audience, identity, reputation, grants, diplomatic pressure, සහ social reach. ඒ incentives වැදගත්; map කළ යුතුයි. නමුත් record එක money-to-message route එකක් පෙන්වන තුරු visible funding හෝ political alignment කියන්නේ message causation proof එකක් නෙවෙයි.
entries.french_draft: Le financement et l'alignement exigent également de la rigueur. Politiques, journalistes, ONG, groupes de la diaspora, institutions étatiques, créateurs et plateformes évoluent tous dans un système d'incitations : donateurs, votes, accès, audience, identité, réputation, subventions, pressions diplomatiques et portée sociale. Ces incitations sont importantes et devraient être cartographiées. Toutefois, un financement visible ou un alignement politique ne prouve pas que le message en découle directement, à moins que les éléments factuels ne mettent en évidence un lien de causalité entre les fonds et le message.
